anti_patterns: No rounded-xl or rounded-2xl (stick to rounded-md or rounded-sm)
No centered text for data tables

usage.h1: font-headings font-bold text-4xl tracking-tight uppercase text-white
usage.label: font-body text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-zinc-500

button.primary: bg-primary hover:bg-primary/90 text-white font-headings font-bold uppercase tracking-wide rounded-sm h-10 px-6
button.secondary: bg-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-700 text-white font-headings font-medium uppercase tracking-wide rounded-sm h-10 px-4 border border-zinc-700

badge.base: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border

visual_enhancers.gradients: None. Use solid colors or extremely subtle noise textures.
visual_enhancers.shadows: None by default. Hover states can have shadow-lg shadow-black/50.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css immediately.
2. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js to use the specific colors and font families defined above.
3. SHADCN OVERRIDES: When installing shadcn components, manually override the radius to 0.375rem (rounded-md) and ensure borders are zinc-800.
4. DATA DENSITY: In tables, use 'py-2' or 'py-3' instead of default 'py-4' to show more data per screen.
5. NO PLACEHOLDERS: Use the provided image URLs. Do not use 'via.placeholder.com'.
6. TEST IDS: Add data-testid to all buttons, inputs, and key data cells (e.g., 'prediction-value', 'odds-value').
7. TOASTS: Use 'sonner' for notifications (e.g., 'Model Trained Successfully').
8. LAYOUT: Use a persistent Sidebar Layout for the dashboard. Login/Register are full-screen with the 'login_background' image.
universal_guidelines: Do not center align data tables.
Use 1px borders instead of soft shadows.
Always use 'Barlow Condensed' for headings to give that 'Sports Scoreboard' feel.
Ensure Green/Red colors are accessible (use specific shades defined in palette).
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all numbers (odds, scores, predictions) to ensure vertical alignment.
